svg.title: Master thesis workflow: from RDT wake to ranked guide-vane designs
svg.desc: Five-stage CFD pipeline showing inputs, MATLAB parametric design, mesh generation in TurboGrid and ANSYS Meshing, CFX simulation of 18 GV configurations plus a no-GV reference and a transient baseline, and post-processing producing a Pareto front and an FFT analysis.

g.text: RDT CFD by Sharma and Djupesland

svg.text: Stage 2 — Parametric guide-vane design in MATLAB

g.text: 9 CC plus 9 CS, c in {250,...,500} mm
SST k-omega, y+ near 1 on blades, GCI verified medium mesh

svg.text: Stage 4 — CFD simulation in ANSYS CFX

g.text: Operating point: m_dot = 290.3 kg/s, n = 650 rpm
total-pressure inlet, mass-flow outlet, water at 25 deg C
delta H, swirl number S, UI
Pareto front: delta H vs swirl number
input to future RDT GV RPT coupled study
